ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the crime occurred */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary type of crime (e.g., NARCOTICS, BATTERY) */,
  "arrest" INTEGER /* Whether an arrest was made */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Whether the crime was domestic */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District where the crime occurred */,
  "fbi_code" TEXT /* FBI code for the crime */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "incident_number" TEXT /* Unique incident number assigned by the police department */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the crime */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number for the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect(s) involved */,
  "weapon_used" TEXT /* Type of weapon used, if any */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim(s) involved */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect, if known */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim, if known */,
  "crime_scene_photos" TEXT /* URL or path to crime scene photos */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Description of evidence collected at the crime scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_fbi_code FOREIGN KEY ("fbi_code") REFERENCES fbi_codes ("fbi_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_primary_type FOREIGN KEY ("primary_type") REFERENCES crime_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., violent, property, narcotics) */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the crime type */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence for the crime type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the crime type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the district information was updated */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fbi_codes" (
  "fbi_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FBI code */,
  "fbi_code" TEXT /* FBI code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FBI code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the FBI code (e.g., violent, property, narcotics) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the FBI code was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fbi_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the location information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_locations" (
  "crime_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-location relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_locations_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_districts" (
  "crime_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-district relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_districts_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_districts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types_crimes" (
  "crime_type_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-type relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_types_crimes_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_types_crimes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_fbi_codes" (
  "crime_fbi_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-FBI code relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "fbi_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FBI code */,
  "fbi_code" TEXT /* FBI code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_fbi_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_fbi_codes_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_fbi_codes_fbi_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("fbi_code_id") REFERENCES fbi_codes ("fbi_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investigator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message in the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime related to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., crime summary, crime analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_crimes" (
  "report_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-crime relationship */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_crimes_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_crimes_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the officer belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the officer information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the suspect */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the suspect */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the suspect */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the suspect */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the suspect */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the suspect */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the suspect information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the victim */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the victim */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the victim */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the victim */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the victim */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the victim */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the victim information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)
